case_title: BLANCA ODILIA GONZALEZ DE DERAS VS. GENESIS LINETT DIAS CASTRO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,000.00 FILED BY GONZALEZ DE DERAS, BLANCA ODILIA AS TO DEFENDANT DIAS CASTRO, GENESIS LINETT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-26-2024 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-26-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-26-2024 BY VISITING JUDGE. PLAINTIFF BLANCA ODILIA GONZALEZ DE DERAS IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER DANIEL NAVARRO. DEFENDANT GENESIS LINETT DIAS CASTRO IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER DANIEL NAVARRO. EXHIBITS RETAINED BY BOTH PARTIES. VISITING JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: L. YOUNG. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GONZALEZ DE DERAS, BLANCA ODILIA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DIAS CASTRO, GENESIS LINETT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $0 SERVED MAR-23-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DIAS CASTRO, GENESIS LINETT
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-26-2024 - JUDGMENT.
REMARK: RETURN OF SMALL CLAIMS "NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT". SENT TO: DEFENDANT - GENESIS LINETT DIAS CASTRO (ENVELOPE MARKED:RETURNED TO SENDER - UNCLAIMED - UNABLE TO FORWARD)
